title: My Life on Ice
overview: Etienne is crazy about ice skating and videoing his daily life with a digital camera. He records his mother, friends, and geography teacher. Initially his intention is to setup a date between his mother and his teacher, however, he starts to realize that he is infatuated with the teacher himself.

trailers.title: Ma vraie vie à Rouen De Jacques Martineau, Olivier Ducastel
